name: perplexity-mcp
description: Perplexity — web search, grounded AI answers, step-by-step reasoning, plus perplexity.ai/finance scrape (Notable Price Movement narratives, quotes, analyst ratings). Owner-only finance tools require `cass cookies sync perplexity-mcp`.

mcpKey.title: MCP bearer token
mcpKey.description: MCP bearer token for this service (managed by `cass refresh-keys`).
